title: The 2017 Season Opener Tournament is just over a week away
excerpt: Have you been itching to get back to competitive squash? content:
Have you been itching to get back to competitive squash? The Edmonton Squash Club is gearing up for the first Squash Alberta sanctioned tournament of the year Friday, September 22nd- Sunday, September 24th.

The cost is only $40 and includes pizza and munchies Friday night, as well as a continental breakfast Saturday and Sunday. There are prizes for all the event winners and runners up.

There are divisions for Men and Women’s Open, A, B, C, D and E. All players are guaranteed 3 games.

You can register on R2Sports at http://www.r2sports.com/tourney/EntryList.asp?TID=22085. Registration closes at 10 PM on Sunday, September 17th.

For any questions, please contact Jeff @ jeff.williams@edmontonsquashclub.ca
